justification: The diff correctly updates Spring Boot to 3.x and Java to 21, and applies Jakarta EE namespace changes (javax.servlet -> jakarta.servlet) and modern annotations (@GetMapping, @DependsOnDatabaseInitialization). However, it introduces spurious churn by removing the main application class's @SpringBootApplication and SpringApplication.run() call (HivereaderApplication.java), which would break the app, and adds redundant JUnit dependencies while excluding junit from spring-boot-starter-test without clear necessity. The String.formatted() usage is a good Java 15+ idiom.
